message:
fix(installer): remove exec before run_server_with_token.sh so caller resumes

The auto-detect script ended with `exec ./scripts/run_server_with_token.sh`,
which replaced the shell process. In the ACFS update flow, the caller
(install.sh) could never run post-install steps (record_summary,
print_summary, status file write) because exec never returns.

Changing to a plain invocation lets the server run in foreground and,
when it exits, control returns to install.sh so post-install logic
executes normally.

Closes #114

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -197,4 +197,4 @@ stop_background_server
 # Also kill any other processes on port 8765 (cross-platform: uses lsof on macOS, fuser on Linux)
 kill_port_processes 8765
 
-exec ./scripts/run_server_with_token.sh
+./scripts/run_server_with_token.sh
